plain_english_summary: Deterministic hand-pose transport codec for XR two-hand joint streams.
commercial_wedge: Reproducible hand-stream transport for XR platforms. Sub-millimeter fidelity (0.479 mm MPJPE), 56× compression, sub-millisecond latency — all traceable to committed benchmark artifacts.
technical_wedge: Deterministic two-hand joint codec. ContactPose benchmark: 0.479 mm MPJPE, 56.144× compression, 0.026 ms encode+decode. Package mechanics real and installable.
ideal_first_buyer: XR platform team or spatial-computing infrastructure team
deployment_model: SDK — Python package candidate with evaluation harness
not_claimed: Public release readiness (modern comparator gate not closed)
Unity or Meta runtime closure (XR-C007 PAUSED_EXTERNAL)
family_position: Product candidate in the Zer0pa deterministic encoding family. ZPE-IMC is the umbrella integration layer.
